news.t: T. Rowe Price Crosses $25 Billion: A New Chapter for an Active Powerhouse

holdings.infoBox: TOUS is an equity ETF with a total of 189 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 4.17%, AstraZeneca at 2.30%, Renesas Electronics at 2.11%, Rolls-Royce Holdings at 1.67%, and UniCredit at 1.65%.

overview.description: The T. Rowe Price International Equity ETF (TOUS) is an exchange-traded fund. The ETF currently has 1450.12m in AUM and 181 holdings. TOUS is an actively managed fund that aims to invest in stocks of any capitalization that are attractively priced and perceived to have high potential for growth TOUS was launched on Jun 14, 2023 and is issued by T. Rowe Price.

data.title: T. Rowe Price Crosses $25 Billion: A New Chapter for an Active Powerhouse
data.text: In my former life as a mutual fund analyst, T. Rowe Price was always a staple of my research.

data.title: ETF flows surge as investors seek safety amid market volatility
data.text: Frank Holland reports on ETF flows, noting shifts away from major index funds and into bonds and European stocks as investors react to U.S. market volatility.
